en: The following contains clips from Disney's Moana, now available on Blu-ray and DVD.
ko: 다음 영상은 디즈니 모아나의 클립입니다. 블루레이와 DVD로 만나보세요.

en: Hm? Ow!
No, I'm not going to Te Fiti with some kid. I'm going to get my hook.
ko: 아니, 어린애랑 테 피티에 안 가. 내 갈고리를 찾으러 갈 거야.

en: You have yours, and I'm not Maui without mine.
ko: 넌 네 거 있잖아, 내 갈고리 없이는 마우이가 아니야.

en: Okay, talk to the back.
Ah! Boat snack! Ah!
Ah! Ah!
Good riddance, you filthy pile of pebbles!
Oh, no, no, no, no. Don't look at me like that. It's a beautiful cave.
ko: 아, 아니아니아니. 그렇게 쳐다보지 마. 아름다운 동굴이야.

en: She's going to love it. And I'm going to love you...
ko: 좋아할 거야. 그리고 난 널 좋아할 거야...

en: in my belly. Now, let's fatten you up, drumstick.
ko: 내 뱃속에서. 자, 살 좀 찌자, 닭다리야.

en: Ah! Ah!
Ah!
I could watch that all day.
Okay, enjoy the island. Maui, out.
No, stop! Hey!
Did not see that coming.
I am Moana of Motunui.
This is my canoe, and you will journey to Te Fiti!
ko: 이건 내 카누야, 테 피티로 갈 거야!

en: All right, get over it. We gotta move.
And she's back. I am Moana of Motunui.
Ah!
It was Moana, right?
Yes, and you will restore the heart.
Ah!
All right, I'm out.
Oh, come on! What is your problem?
Yep, I just did that.
No, no, no, no, no, no!
ko: 안 돼, 안 돼, 안 돼!

en: Hey!
Maui!
They took the heart! No, no, no, no!
That's a chicken. The heart is in the...
We have to get him back.
Maui!
...knowing where you are by knowing where you've been.
ko: ...네가 어디에 있었는지 알면 네 위치를 알 수 있어.

en: Okay, first, I'm not a princess.
I'm the daughter of the chief. Same difference. No.
If you wear a dress and you have an animal sidekick, you're a princess.
ko: 드레스 입고 동물 친구 있으면 공주야.

en: You are not a wayfinder. You will never be a wayfinder.
ko: 넌 항해사가 아니야. 절대 될 수 없어.

en: You will never be a way...
Really? Blow dart in my butt cheek.
You are a bad person.
If you can talk, you can teach. Wayfinding.
ko: 말할 수 있으면 가르칠 수 있어. 항해술.

en: Lesson one. Hit it.
Pull the sheet. Not the sheet.
No. Nope. Nope. Nope.
Tried that one already.
You're measuring the stars, not giving the sky a high five.
ko: 별을 재는 거야, 하늘한테 하이파이브하는 게 아니라.

en: If the current's warm, you're going the right way.
It's cold. Wait. It's getting warmer.
That is disgusting! What is wrong with you?
Maui's fish hook. Yeah.
Sorry. I thought you were a monster, but I found your hook.
ko: 미안. 괴물인 줄 알았는데, 네 갈고리를 찾았어.

en: And you're right. This Tamatoa guy really likes his treasure. What?
ko: 맞아, 이 타마토아란 녀석 보물을 진짜 좋아하더라. 뭐?

en: No. I'm the one who... Listen.
For a thousand years, I've only been thinking of keeping this hair silky, getting my hook,
ko: 천 년 동안 이 머리카락 부드럽게 하고, 갈고리 찾고,

en: and being awesome again.
And it's not getting screwed up by a mortal who has no business inside of a monster cave,
ko: 괴물 동굴에 들어올 일 없는 인간이 망치진 않을 거야,

en: except... except... maybe his bait.
ko: 다만... 다만... 미끼는 될 수 있지.

en: Huh? Wow!
The shiny, glittery cave!
And just like me, it is covered in sparkly treasure.
ko: 그리고 나처럼 반짝이는 보물로 덮여 있어.

en: Sparkle, sparkle, sparkle. You're not selling it. This is stupid.
ko: 반짝, 반짝, 반짝. 설득력 없어. 바보 같아.

en: I'm just gonna walk up and get it. You go up there, he will kill you.
Just stick to the plan. Oh, when he shows up, keep him distracted.
Make him talk about himself. He loves bragging about how great he is.
ko: 자기 자랑 하게 해. 자기가 얼마나 대단한지 떠드는 거 좋아하거든.

en: You two must get along swell. Not since I ripped off his leg.
ko: 너희 둘 사이 좋겠다. 다리를 뜯은 후로는 아니야.

en: You ripped off his... Maui?
What?
We're alive! Listen.
I, uh, appreciate what you did down there. Took guts.
ko: 네가 아래서 한 거, 용기 있었어. 고마워.

en: But, uh, I'm sorry. I'm trying to be sincere for once, and it feels like you're distracted.
ko: 근데, 미안해. 처음으로 진심으로 말하려는데 딴 데 보는 것 같아.

en: No! No! No way!
Really? Because you're looking at me like I have a...
ko: 진짜? 나한테 뭔가 있는 것처럼 보고 있으니까...

en: A shark head. What?
Do you have a shark head? Look, the point is,
for a little girl, child, thing, whatever, who had no business being down there,
you did me a solid. But you also almost died.
ko: 나한테 큰 도움을 줬어. 근데 죽을 뻔했잖아.

en: And I couldn't even beat the dumb crab. So chances of beating Taka...
ko: 그 멍청한 게도 못 이겼어. 테 카를 이길 확률은...

en: Bupkus. We're never making it to Te Fiti. This mission is cursed.
ko: 제로야. 테 피티에 절대 못 가. 이 임무는 저주받았어.

en: It's not cursed. Shark head. It is...
ko: 저주받은 거 아니야. 상어 머리. 맞다고...

en: not cursed! Oh!
